description: A weekly companion to School's Out Saturdays. Practical signals, questions, and opportunities from the edge of school and work.
author: Jason Padgett

issues.title: The Greyed-Out Button
issues.description: Six hundred educators spent the day learning AI tools most of their students are not allowed to touch.

issues.title: Shared Language Is Not Enough
issues.description: Schools need shared definitions. A field guide for spotting critical thinking, communication, adaptability, and preparedness in actual student work, not just in mission statements.

issues.title: The Bridge Is the Assignment
issues.description: Access to AI is spreading fast. Readiness is something else. Students do not become ready because they can open a chatbot.
